name: RGB-D Camera (Intel RealSense D455)
description: A stereo depth camera providing RGB images and depth maps. Ideal for object detection, 3D reconstruction, and navigation.

name: 2D LiDAR Scanner (RPLiDAR A1)
description: A 360-degree 2D laser scanner for mapping and obstacle avoidance. Commonly used in indoor mobile robot navigation.

name: 6-Axis Force/Torque Sensor (FT-300)
description: A high-precision 6-axis force/torque sensor for measuring contact forces during manipulation. Essential for assembly and polishing tasks.

name: Industrial Temperature Sensor (PT100 RTD)
description: A platinum resistance temperature detector for accurate temperature measurement in industrial environments. Suitable for process monitoring.

name: Infrared Proximity Sensor (IR-Sharp GP2Y0A21)
description: A compact infrared proximity sensor for short-range distance measurement and object detection. Simple analog output.

name: IMU (9-DOF Inertial Measurement Unit BNO055)
description: A 9-axis inertial measurement unit combining accelerometer, gyroscope, and magnetometer with on-chip sensor fusion.

name: 3D LiDAR (Velodyne VLP-16 Puck)
description: A high-performance 3D LiDAR with 16 channels, generating detailed 3D point clouds for autonomous navigation and environment mapping.

name: Machine Vision Camera (Basler ace 2)
description: A high-resolution industrial machine vision camera for quality inspection, barcode reading, and precise visual measurements.

name: Ultrasonic Distance Sensor (HC-SR04)
description: A low-cost ultrasonic distance sensor for basic ranging and object detection. Great for educational projects and prototyping.

name: Thermal Imaging Camera (FLIR Lepton 3.5)
description: A compact thermal imaging camera module that captures infrared thermal images. Useful for detecting heat signatures and monitoring equipment temperature.

name: Encoder (Optical Rotary, 2048 PPR)
description: A high-resolution optical rotary encoder for precise position and velocity feedback on motor shafts and joints.
